_patch_meta.description: Phase 2 UT verse review for cluster M05 — Love, Compassion and Kindness. 34 confirmed-relevant verses classified (is_relevant=1, group_id null). 8 set-aside verses classified (is_relevant=0, set_aside_reason populated). 1 borderline verse (Neh 13:14 / H2617A / vrID=3940) held — NOT included in this patch. IDs resolved from wa-cluster-M05-comprehensive-v3-20260507.md.

borderline_held.reason: Term spans meritorious-deeds sense; covenantal loyalty appeal implicit but not primary register. Held for researcher decision before inclusion.

set.set_aside_reason: Term used in behavioural/historical record sense (good deeds catalogue of Hezekiah); inner disposition of covenantal kindness not in view
Term used in behavioural/historical record sense (good deeds catalogue of Josiah); inner disposition of covenantal kindness not in view
Term used in sense of outward beauty/loveliness (flower of field); inner disposition of covenantal kindness not in view

Term used in sensory/pleasantness sense (old wine is good/pleasant); inner character quality of kindness/goodness not in view
